title: Predator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Predator''' could refer to any of the following:
*[[Predator-class fighter|''Predator''-class fighter]]
*[[Predator-class gunship|''Predator''-class gunship]]
*[[Predator-class warship|''Predator''-class warship]]
*[[Predator I]] [[Hyperdrive pod/Legends|hyperdrive pod]]
*Kell Douro's CloakShape fighter, the [[Predator (Kell Douro's ship)|''Predator'']]
*The [[HMP droid gunship/Legends|HMP droid gunship]], also known as HMP ''Predator''
*[[Predator (scout ship)|''Predator'']], a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that was owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Khlor]]

{{Disambig}}
